notableEvents.label: Elly De La Cruz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Elly De La Cruz grounds into a double play, pitcher Foster Griffin to second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Luis García Jr. Dane Myers out at 2nd. Elly De La Cruz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Nasim Nuñez reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher Chase Burns, assist to first baseman Sal Stewart.

notableEvents.label: Nasim Nuñez reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Nasim Nuñez reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher Chase Burns, assist to first baseman Sal Stewart.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Nasim Nuñez steals (18) 2nd base. Nasim Nuñez to 3rd. Nasim Nuñez advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Jose Trevino.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Luis Mey. Drew Millas scores. Brady House to 2nd.
